_comment: RECOMMENDED MCP SERVERS — this file is NOT loaded automatically.
The be plugin deliberately ships no auto-started MCP servers: every
server adds processes, permissions, and tool-schema tokens to your
context. Review each entry, keep only what the project needs, and copy
the result to your project's .mcp.json (project root).

github._comment: PR/issue workflows used by proc-code-review and the sprint protocol. Requires a GitHub PAT.

context7._comment: Up-to-date library documentation on demand — pairs well with proc-dependency-management.

postgres._comment: Read-only database inspection — pairs with be-db-migrations and dev-data-analyst. Point at a DEV database, never production.
